tdd.md.note: Not applicable — curation project has no production code to TDD

agent-native-catalog.md.note: Applied to every tool entry. Zero false positives. Keep as hard requirement.

yaml-only-direct-push.md.note: Applied to 3 catalog commits. No regressions. Safe.

auto-pipeline-for-curation.md.note: 3 successful pipeline runs. Structured thinking consistently valuable.

mid-file-yaml-edits.md.note: Anti-pattern. 3 edit failures caused by mid-file insertions.

incremental-catalog-runs.md.note: Anti-pattern. 3 runs when 1 would suffice. Redundant overhead.

catalog-yaml-valid.sh.note: YAML validated every time. Zero syntax errors across 35 entries.

catalog-category-count.sh.note: Category counts verified every run. All hitting targets.

test-suite.sh.note: 209 tests pass after every catalog change. Zero regressions.

proposed_rules.name: pre-verify-tool-metadata
proposed_rules.reason: anti-patterns/verify-before-describe — write descriptions only after verifying repo_url, license, stars, activity

proposed_rules.name: batch-catalog-additions
proposed_rules.reason: anti-patterns/incremental-catalog-runs — if adding >5 tools, do it in 1 pipeline run

proposed_rules.name: append-not-insert-yaml
proposed_rules.reason: anti-patterns/mid-file-yaml-edits — add new tools to end of file to avoid whitespace conflicts
